top_signals.title: Trump-backed World Liberty Financial nears OCC approval for federal trust charter: report
top_signals.summary: The federal trust bank charter grant would allow World Liberty to issue and redeem its USD1 stablecoin under a single federal regulator.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.
